ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the court */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number of the player in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abv" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point attempts */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "two_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of two-pointers made */,
  "two_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of two-point attempts */,
  "two_point_percentage" REAL /* Two-point percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player Efficiency Rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True Shooting Percentage */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Usage Percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., active, traded) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Basic contract details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_associations_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_associations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_associations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, team) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_information" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official league website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
